mapper.select: SELECT member_id, name, email, password_hash, postal_code, address, phone, birth_date, gender, member_rank, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( name, email, password_hash, postal_code, address, phone, birth_date, gender, member_rank, status, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{postalCode}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{birthDate}, #{gender}, #{memberRank}, #{status}, #{deletedAt} )
